prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约11739→12651→13349→13240→12332，呈先降后升的V型走势；2025年较2024年大幅前移约908名，回到接近2022年水平，显示报考热 度回升；2025年基准约12332名；本省物理类计划2021年288人、2022年285人、2023年285人、2024年277人、2025年277人；2026年计划277人，与2025年 持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第113名，近年排名在99–113之间小幅波动，整体层次稳定；近年声誉平稳，未见重大负面或正面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第50位（较热），2023年分年排名第11位（高热），短视频平台有一定曝光度，对报考关注度有温和 提振；第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校，但该校以交通运输工程、航海技术、轮机工程等海事特色学科见长，相关专业在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类等工科专业社会热度持续较高；辽宁省2026年普通高考总考生约200,000人，较2025年（物理类143,368+历史类56,324≈199,692）基本持平 ，竞争规模稳定；大连海事大学位于辽宁省大连市，为本省211高校，对本省考生有天然的地缘吸引力；该校在辽宁省招 生计划占比较高，本地考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的强势走势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数基本稳定、学校层次稳定且声誉平稳等因 素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准12332名基础上小幅后移约50名，预测最低位次约12382名，区间11882–12882名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11739 → 12651 → 13349 → 13240 → 12332, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2025, it moved significantly forward by about 908 places compared to 2024, returning to near the 2022 level, indicating a rebound in application popularity; the 2025 baseline is approximately 12332; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 288 in 2021, 285 in 2022, 285 in 2023, 277 in 2024, and 277 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 277, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 113th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 99 and 113, maintaining a stable overall level; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major negative or positive public opinion incidents; its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 50th (relatively hot), and its 2023 annual ranking is 11th (very hot), with some exposure on short video platforms, which has a mild boosting effect on application attention; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data has not been included for this university, but it is known for its maritime specialties such as Transportation Engineering, Navigation Technology, and Marine Engineering, which are highly recognized within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province general college entrance examination is approximately 200,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (Physics Category 143,368 + History Category 56,324 ≈ 199,692), with a stable competitive scale; Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, and as a provincial 211 university, it has a natural geographical appeal to local candidates; the university has a relatively high proportion of enrollment plans in the province, and local candidates have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound trend of the 2025 ranking, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the basically stable total number of provincial candidates, and the stable school level and reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will slightly shift backward by about 50 places from the 2025 baseline of 12332, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 12382, and a range of 11882–12882.
